# Vigilo

> Real-time global disease outbreak monitoring and epidemiological surveillance

Vigilo is a public-health intelligence tool that tracks active disease outbreaks,
food safety recalls, and environmental health conditions worldwide — updated every 12 hours
from official sources.

## What it does

- Monitors 100+ active disease outbreaks on an interactive 3D globe
- Severity classification: Critical / Alert / Warning / Monitoring (WHO-aligned)
- Food safety alerts: FDA recalls, EU RASFF, UK FSA, Health Canada
- Health Weather per country: air quality (AQI), pollen, flu activity
- Email alerts when outbreaks appear in user's watched countries
- Personal feed: aggregated alerts filtered to user's regions
- Available in English and Russian

## Data sources (updated every 12 hours via GitHub Actions)

- WHO Disease Outbreak News (DON)
- ECDC Communicable Disease Threats Report
- Eurosurveillance (peer-reviewed European CDC journal)
- Russia: Rospotrebnadzor RSS (Federal Service for Consumer Rights Protection)
- China: China CDC Weekly (National Disease Control and Prevention Administration)
- Disasters: GDACS (Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System)
- Food: FDA openFDA API, EU RASFF, UK Food Standards Agency, Health Canada
- Air quality: Open-Meteo Air Quality API (real-time)

## Live data endpoints (public, no auth)

- Active outbreaks JSON: https://vigilo.cc/public/events.json
- Food safety recalls JSON: https://vigilo.cc/public/food_recalls.json
- Active alerts JSON: https://vigilo.cc/public/alerts.json

## URLs

- English: https://vigilo.cc/
- Russian: https://vigilo.cc/ru/

## Keywords

disease outbreak map, epidemic monitoring, global health surveillance, WHO outbreak tracker,
infectious disease map, real-time epidemiology, public health intelligence, food safety recalls,
outbreak alerts, disease surveillance tool, карта вспышек заболеваний, эпидемиологический мониторинг
